title: Slumbering Essence
description: If this card is in your hand at the end of turn, reduce its cost by [blue]1[/blue] until it is played.
notes: The cost reduction is applied via AddUntilPlayed(-1) each turn the card remains in hand at end of turn (BeforeFlush), so the cost decreases by 1 per turn it stays unplayed. The reduction resets when the card is played.
